prompt_text:
### Demographics: 70-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 12 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Orthopedic fracture (healed)
Cataract (status post surgery)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF (No); ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older brother)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 80.5 kg; Height 166.3 cm; BMI 29.1 kg/m²; Blood pressure 136/89 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.3%; 9 months ago 8.7%; 6 months ago 8.2%; 3 months ago 7.7%; current 5.9%), FPG (12 months ago 223mg/dL; 9 months ago 220mg/dL; 6 months ago 218mg/dL; 3 months ago 207mg/dL; current 146mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 81.9kg; 9 months ago 78.3kg; 6 months ago 81.3kg; 3 months ago 77.2kg; current 80.5kg), Height (12 months ago 166.3cm; 9 months ago 166.3cm; 6 months ago 166.3cm; 3 months ago 166.3cm; current 166.3cm), BMI (12 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 28.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 28.0kg/m²; current 29.1kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 138mmHg; 9 months ago 137mmHg; 6 months ago 139mmHg; 3 months ago 136mmHg; current 136mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 89mmHg; 9 months ago 89mmHg; 6 months ago 89mmHg; 3 months ago 91mmHg; current 89mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 57U/L; 9 months ago 48U/L; 6 months ago 44U/L; 3 months ago 42U/L; current 55U/L), AST (12 months ago 42U/L; 9 months ago 46U/L; 6 months ago 36U/L; 3 months ago 36U/L; current 46U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.2mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 42mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 39mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 38mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 37mL/min/1.73m²; current 38mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 248mg/g; 9 months ago 258mg/g; 6 months ago 184mg/g; 3 months ago 170mg/g; current 201mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 88mg/dL; 9 months ago 88mg/dL; 6 months ago 87mg/dL; 3 months ago 86mg/dL; current 90mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 58mg/dL; 9 months ago 55mg/dL; 6 months ago 57mg/dL; 3 months ago 55mg/dL; current 56mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 127mg/dL; 9 months ago 109mg/dL; 6 months ago 114mg/dL; 3 months ago 130mg/dL; current 121mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 12.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.2g/dL; current 11.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
